install.title: Bitwarden CLI Not Found
install.description: The Nuxy Bitwarden extension uses {tool} (a Rust-based Bitwarden CLI client) in the background to securely access your passwords. Please install rbw before continuing.

arch.label: Arch Linux / CachyOS
arch.heading: Installation for Arch Linux / CachyOS:
arch.description: Install the {rbw} and {pinentry} packages from the repositories:

configure.title: Connect Your Bitwarden Account
configure.description: Enter the email address for your Bitwarden account. This address will be saved to the {rbw} configuration file on your local machine.

errors.emailRequired: Please enter a valid email address.

lock.title: Your Bitwarden Vault is Locked
lock.description: Press the button below to unlock your vault. A password entry window (Pinentry) will open on your desktop:
lock.unlocking: A password entry window has opened on your desktop. Please enter your Bitwarden master password.
lock.alternativeUnlock: Alternatively, you can also unlock via your terminal:

errors.unlockFailed: Unlock failed. Pinentry may have been closed.

search.placeholder: Type the name of the password you want to search for.
